> Like of all the new units we ever shipped, galv had one of the best reactions from the community
> It also creates a lot of very different games in certain situations, like galv + antima

> The elegance and simplicity of unit designs like 1E galvani amplifies the effect because people find it even more surprising that something very simple can have such a profound change to gameplay
